items.definition_en: Cheese is a solid food made from milk.
items.example_en: He put cheese on his sandwich.

items.definition_en: Butter is a yellow fat food made from milk.
items.example_en: She spread butter on her toast.

items.definition_en: Yogurt is a creamy food made from milk.
items.example_en: I like to eat yogurt for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Cream is the thick part of milk used in food.
items.example_en: We added cream to the soup.

items.definition_en: Ice cream is a cold sweet dessert made from milk or cream.
items.example_en: The children ate chocolate ice cream.

items.definition_en: Cottage cheese is a soft white cheese with small pieces.
items.example_en: She sprinkled fruit on her cottage cheese.

items.definition_en: Sour cream is a thick, tangy cream often used in cooking.
items.example_en: We put sour cream on our baked potatoes.

items.definition_en: A yoghurt drink is a liquid dairy product made from yogurt.
items.example_en: He bought a strawberry yoghurt drink for lunch.

items.definition_en: Ghee is a type of clarified butter used in cooking.
items.example_en: She cooked the vegetables in ghee.

items.definition_en: Whey is the liquid part left after making cheese.
items.example_en: Whey is sometimes used in drinks and baking.

items.definition_en: Curd is the thick part of milk that forms when it turns sour.
items.example_en: Curd is used in many Indian dishes.

items.definition_en: Whipped cream is cream that has been beaten until light and fluffy.
items.example_en: The pie was topped with whipped cream.

items.definition_en: Skim milk is milk with almost all the fat removed.
items.example_en: He prefers skim milk in his coffee.

items.definition_en: Hard cheese is a firm type of cheese like cheddar.
items.example_en: They served hard cheese on crackers.

items.definition_en: Soft cheese is a creamy type of cheese like brie.
items.example_en: She likes soft cheese with bread.

items.definition_en: Kefir is a sour dairy drink made by fermenting milk.
items.example_en: Kefir is often enjoyed as a healthy drink.

items.definition_en: Clotted cream is a very thick, rich cream.
items.example_en: They served clotted cream with scones.

items.definition_en: Ricotta is a soft, creamy Italian cheese.
items.example_en: She added ricotta to the pasta.

items.definition_en: Mozzarella is a white, soft Italian cheese.
items.example_en: He put mozzarella on the pizza.

items.definition_en: Crème fraîche is a thick, slightly sour cream used in recipes.
items.example_en: They stirred crème fraîche into the sauce.
